_comment_strategy: SUBSCRIPTION BALANCE STRATEGY
GitHub Copilot (student) → GPT-native agents (Hephaestus, Oracle, Momus),
utility agents (Explore, Librarian, Multimodal-Looker), visual/deep categories.
OpenCode Go ($10/mo)   → Claude-native orchestration path (Sisyphus, Prometheus,
Metis, Atlas) using Kimi/GLM/DeepSeek. Quick/cheap work uses qwen3.5-plus
and deepseek-v4-flash (massive quotas: 10200 and 31650 req/5hr respectively).
DEPRECATED → REPLACED
mimo-v2-pro          → opencode-go/mimo-v2.5-pro
mimo-v2-omni         → opencode-go/mimo-v2.5
minimax-m2.7-highspeed → opencode-go/minimax-m2.7
gpt-5.3-codex        → github-copilot/gpt-5.2-codex  (only codex available)
gpt-5.4              → not available; replaced by gpt-5.2 at high variant
claude-opus-4.6      → not in Copilot list; removed
claude-sonnet-4.5    → not in Copilot list; removed
xiaomi-token-plan-sgp/* → gone
AGENT GROUPS (per omo docs)
Claude-native  (1100-line prompts, instruction-following): Sisyphus, Prometheus, Metis
Dual-prompt    (Claude preferred, GPT fallback):           Atlas, Sisyphus-Junior
GPT-native     (principle-driven, autonomous):             Hephaestus, Oracle, Momus
Utility/speed  (fast + cheap):                             Explore, Librarian, Multimodal-Looker

sisyphus._comment: Main orchestrator. Claude-native prompt (~1100 lines). Kimi K2.6 is vision-capable and best OSS substitute for Claude Opus. Stay on Go to preserve Copilot for GPT-native agents.

hephaestus._comment: MUST be GPT-codex. No substitute. Autonomous deep worker — give it a goal, not a recipe. gpt-5.2-codex is the only codex model in your available Copilot list. No fallback per omo docs.

oracle._comment: Read-only high-IQ consultant. GPT-native, principle-driven. Move entirely to Copilot to save Go quota. gpt-5.2 high is the strongest available GPT reasoning model in your list.

librarian._comment: Docs + OSS code search. Speed matters, not depth. Copilot gemini-flash is fast and free here. Go fallback uses qwen3.5-plus (10,200 req/5hr — nearly unlimited quota).

explore._comment: Fast codebase grep. grok-code-fast-1 is specifically recommended by omo docs for this agent and uses Copilot. gpt-5.4-mini as Copilot fallback. Go fallback: qwen3.5-plus (cheapest, fastest).

multimodal-looker._comment: Vision + screenshot analysis. gemini-3-flash has vision, is fast, uses Copilot quota (not Go). gpt-4o as secondary vision fallback on Copilot.

prometheus._comment: Strategic planner. Dual-prompt but Claude-path preferred (interview-style, ~1100 lines). Kimi K2.6 is best OSS for this. Go-first to preserve Copilot. DeepSeek V4 Pro holds up on multi-step planning.

metis._comment: Gap analyzer — catches what Prometheus missed. Claude-native prompt, reasoning-intensive but shorter task. Kimi K2.6 or K2.5 sufficient.

momus._comment: Ruthless plan reviewer. GPT-native, xhigh reasoning — output gates execution so quality matters. Copilot-first. gemini-3.1-pro as Copilot fallback. DeepSeek V4 Pro as last resort (retains GPT autonomous character per docs).

atlas._comment: Executes Prometheus plans. Dual-prompt (Claude preferred, GPT supported). K2.5 is cheaper than K2.6 and sufficient for structured checklist execution. DeepSeek Flash as ultra-cheap Go fallback.

sisyphus-junior._comment: Lightweight orchestrator for simpler tasks. Uses cheapest capable Go models. qwen3.5-plus (10,200 req/5hr) and deepseek-v4-flash (31,650 req/5hr) burn almost no quota.

visual-engineering._comment: UI/frontend tasks — needs vision reasoning. Copilot gemini-3.1-pro is strong here. gemini-2.5-pro as Copilot fallback. Kimi K2.6 (vision-capable) as Go fallback.

ultrabrain._comment: Highest reasoning tasks (architecture, security, complex debugging). GPT-5.2 high on Copilot is the best available. gemini-3.1-pro as Copilot fallback.

deep._comment: Deep coding tasks. gpt-5.2-codex medium is the best codex available in Copilot. 'DeepSeek >> MiniMax' per omo docs for multi-step autonomous work.

artistry._comment: Creative/design tasks. Gemini models excel at aesthetics and prose quality. mimo-v2.5-pro as Go fallback (vision capable, higher quality than minimax for creative work).

quick._comment: Trivial spawned tasks. qwen3.5-plus = 10,200 req/5hr (highest Go quota). deepseek-v4-flash = 31,650 req/5hr (virtually unlimited). These burn almost no Go budget.

unspecified-low._comment: Moderate tasks, unclassified. DeepSeek V4 Pro on Go: good balance of quality and quota (3,450 req/5hr). Kimi K2.5 as primary fallback.

unspecified-high._comment: Complex unclassified tasks. Kimi K2.6 on Go is vision-capable and handles complex nested work well. DeepSeek V4 Pro as second Go option. Copilot GPT as last resort.

writing._comment: Documentation, prose, technical writing. Gemini flash on Copilot is fluent and fast. qwen3.5-plus as cheap Go fallback.
